help.title: How to obtain Apple Connect credentials
help.description: Follow these steps to get your Apple App Store Connect API keys:
help.step1: Log in to App Store Connect and navigate to Users and Access > Keys
help.step2: Click + to create a new key
help.step3: Enter a name for the key and select App Store Connect API role (at least App Manager)
help.step4: Click Generate, then copy the Issuer ID from the top right of the page
